subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. It was like the melody of the divine nightingale
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه تو رسید مانند آهنگ عندلیب الهی بود که شهنازش سبب فرح قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity
